headline: A Look At Deckers Outdoor (DECK) Valuation As Shares Show Ongoing Momentum
summary: Why Deckers Outdoor is on investors’ radar today Deckers Outdoor (DECK) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $109.77. For investors, the current level invites a closer look at what the business generates today. See our latest analysis for Deckers Outdoor. The recent 3.2% 1 day share price return and 11.7% 7 day share price return come on top of a 5 year total shareholder return of 94%, suggesting momentum has been building over the longer...
